title: 11 Herbal Creams to Ease Inflamed Gums for Smokers
description: Aloe barbadensis creams are a natural remedy for inflamed gums. They contain properties like aloe-emodin, aloe-bergenin, and aloe-aloenin that have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. These constituents help soothe and calm inflamed gums, reducing redness and swelling. Aloe barbadensis creams also contain vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and potassium, which promote healing and tissue repair.
